chunks.text: Model Selection Through Sparse Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Multivariate Gaussian or Binary Data | EECS at UC Berkeley Model Selection Through Sparse Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Multivariate Gaussian or Binary Data Onureena Banerjee EECS Department, University of California, Berkeley Technical Report No. UCB/EECS-2007-151 December 14, 2007 http://www2.eecs.berkeley.edu/Pubs/TechRpts/2007/EECS-2007-151.pdf Advisors: Laurent El Ghaoui BibTeX citation: @phdthesis{Banerjee:EECS-2007-151, Author= {Banerjee, Onureena}, Title= {Model Selection Through Sparse Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Multivariate Gaussian or Binary Data}, School= {EECS Department, University of California, Berkeley}, Year= {2007}, Month= {Dec}, Url= {http://www2.eecs.berkeley.edu/Pubs/TechRpts/2007/EECS-2007-151.html}, Number= {UCB/EECS-2007-151}, } EndNote citation: %0 Thesis %A Banerjee, Onureena %T Model Selection Through Sparse Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Multivariate Gaussian or Binary Data %I EECS Department, University of California, Berkeley %D 2007 %8 December 14 %@ UCB/EECS-2007-151 %U http://www2.eecs.berkeley.edu/Pubs/TechRpts/2007/EECS-2007-151.html %F Banerjee:EECS-2007-151
